headline: State Street Corporation (STT) Says Q1 Results Are Expected to Come in Stronger Than Previously Anticipated
summary: State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now. On March 11, 2026, State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) said at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference that first-quarter results are expected to come in stronger than what the company had anticipated earlier in the year.
